tasks.description: Fix Default Working Directory to use the actual project directory instead of the Electron app bundle path (/Applications/Agent Studio.app/Contents/Resources). Auto-detect from cwd or first tracked project.

Show Teams, Memory, and Reports tabs in the top navigation. If agent system is not configured, show tabs but display an explanatory empty state with a CTA to configure instead of hiding them entirely.
Add a label or tooltip to the cost display in the top bar explaining what the dollar amount represents (e.g., 'Total cost today' or 'API spend').
Show meaningful session identifiers in the Running on Machine section - include project name, agent type, or task description instead of just the model name.
Generate human-readable session names for recent sessions instead of showing truncated prompt text. Use the session name field, first prompt summary, or agent + project combination.
Make the default model setting in General actually propagate to the New Session launcher modal. The model dropdown should reflect whatever is configured in settings.
Add a close/dismiss button (X) to the setup wizard and prevent it from persisting across page reloads when triggered from Re-run Setup Wizard. The wizard should be dismissable at any step.
Add Teams tab to the main top navigation bar so users can discover rooms and sprints without using the command palette.
Add Memory tab to the main navigation with browse, search, filter, and detail view capabilities. Show empty state with explanation when no memories exist.
Add a close/X button to the setup wizard that allows users to exit at any step without completing it. Also add Escape key support to dismiss.
Make the Limits link open in a new tab (target=_blank) and add an external link icon to indicate it navigates away from the app.
Allow users to rename sessions from the sidebar context menu or inline editing.
Add search/filter input to the Recent Sessions section in the sidebar. NOTE: Search input exists but does NOT filter results -- filter logic is broken or missing.
Add confirmation dialog before killing processes. Show process details and warn that the action cannot be undone.
Add confirmation dialog before closing/destroying rooms to prevent accidental data loss.
Elevate Sprints to be more discoverable - either as a top-level tab or prominently linked from the Teams view.
Persist notification settings server-side instead of browser-only, or make the 'local only' warning more prominent.
Show which session will be resumed in the 'Continue Last' button (e.g., name, time, agent used).
Show per-session cost in the sidebar session list entries.
Add explanatory text or tooltip for PMO Scheduler explaining what PMO means and what scans do.
Add Automations section to Settings or clarify that automation is handled through Sprints/PMO.
Clarify the relationship between Running on Machine processes and Sessions. Explain that Running on Machine shows all system-wide Claude processes, not just ones started from Agent Studio.
Either implement the workflow builder or remove the empty WORKFLOWS section that shows 'No workflows found' with no way to create one.
Group sessions in the sidebar into categories (Sprint Team vs Standalone) as specified in the design doc.
Add Reports tab to the navigation with the ability to view automation/sprint results.
Surface agent system configuration in the Teams/Memory empty states, not just in Settings. Guide users to set it up from the feature they're trying to use.
Add a brief explanation or tooltip for the API peak/off-peak indicator for new users.
Dynamically read the git branch name for the About section instead of using a hardcoded/stale value.
Add text labels or improved visual distinction to notification toggle buttons beyond just color.
Add an 'Add Repo' button to the Repos section in the sidebar for quick repo addition.
Make the :8080 port button open the URL in the browser or show a confirmation toast.
Fix the API: Off-Peak badge to not wrap awkwardly at narrow viewport widths.
Ensure consistent labeling of nav tabs (both should show icons + text or just text).
Show memory pressure instead of raw usage in system monitor to avoid false alarms on macOS.
Add loading indicators (amber line or skeleton) for async actions like View Changes, server start/stop.
Verify Geist Mono is loaded and used as the primary font throughout the app.
Clarify the SERVERS count in the sidebar header - show running/total (e.g., '1/3') instead of just running count.
Remove duplicate duration display in Running on Machine entries - show duration in one place only.

Fix the Sessions empty state 'New Session' button bleeding through to ALL other tabs (Teams, Sprints, Knowledge, Settings). The button floats at a fixed position overlapping content. This is a z-index or visibility regression introduced by the tab navigation fix.
Rename 'Knowledge' tab to 'Memory' for consistency with the design spec, IDENTITY.md, and all task/checklist references.
Change notification toggle switches from green to amber to comply with IDENTITY.md color scheme (amber is the only accent color).
Add text labels to the left icon sidebar navigation or ensure tooltips appear on hover for discoverability.
Add dynamic git branch info back to the About section, or include more system information to make the section useful.
Improve session name display in History sidebar -- names are heavily truncated at 200px sidebar width. Show more context or use full-width tooltips on hover.
Sessions empty state text and New Session button appear below Dev Servers table in the Servers sub-tab. The session empty state should be hidden when the Servers view is active.
Sprint detail view has Resume button but no Cancel button. Users cannot abandon a sprint that is going wrong from the UI.
